title: At least 11 people killed as wildfires sweep southern Spain
summary_full: The deaths in Andalusia included foreign nationals, and high temperatures raised fears of more fires across Europe.
summary_public: The deaths in Andalusia included foreign nationals, and high temperatures raised fears of more fires across Europe.
